mnemonics: VISION Helps Recall: Videos, Images, Surveys, Insights, Overviews, Notes - to build your knowledge pyramid for Module 5.
keyPoints: Official university lecture slides and notes are the primary resource.
Recommended textbooks provide foundational theory and in-depth explanations.
Online video lectures and coding tutorials offer practical, visual demonstrations.
commonMistakes: Relying solely on one resource type (e.g., only videos) instead of a balanced mix for both theory and practice.
Using outdated tutorials or resources that demonstrate deprecated libraries or methods.
Skipping the foundational textbook reading and going straight to code, leading to gaps in theoretical understanding.
